spells.name: Rending Strike
spells.description:
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 178/196 physical damage.
Applies one Rending Bleed Charge.
Each Rending Bleed Charge deals 83/91 over 6s (stacks up to 3 times).
If the maximum amount of stacks is reached, the affected enemies' Healing Received is reduced by 12% for 5s.
spells.description_html:
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 178/196 physical damage.

Applies one Rending Bleed Charge.

Each Rending Bleed Charge deals 83/91 over 6s (stacks up to 3 times).

If the maximum amount of stacks is reached, the affected enemies' Healing Received is reduced by 12% for 5s.

spells.name: Rending Spin
spells.description:
Swing the weapon around you dealing physical damage to all enemies in a 6m radius around you. Deals 248 to enemies that are at least 3m away and 149 to enemies that are closer than that. Also inflicts a Rending Bleed to each enemy hit, which lasts for 6s and deals 18 physical damage per second. (Stacks up to 3 times.)
If you build up 3 stacks, enemies hit will have their healing received reduced by 20% for 5s.
spells.description_html:
Swing the weapon around you dealing physical damage to all enemies in a 6m radius around you. Deals 248 to enemies that are at least 3m away and 149 to enemies that are closer than that. Also inflicts a Rending Bleed to each enemy hit, which lasts for 6s and deals 18 physical damage per second. (Stacks up to 3 times.)

If you build up 3 stacks, enemies hit will have their healing received reduced by 20% for 5s.

spells.name: Rending Rage
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2.5s.
1st and 2nd Rending Rage:
Cleave all enemies in a cone in the targeted direction, dealing 165/181 physical damage.
Applies one Rending Bleed Charge.
3rd Raging Leap:
Leap towards the targeted position, Rooting all enemies in a 5m radius for 1.61/1.77
Deals 165/181 physical damage
Each Rending Bleed Charge deals 83/91 physical damage over 6s (stacks up to 3 times).
If the maximum amount of stacks is reached, the affected enemies' Healing Received is reduced by 12% for 5s.
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2.5s.

1st and 2nd Rending Rage:

Cleave all enemies in a cone in the targeted direction, dealing 165/181 physical damage.

Applies one Rending Bleed Charge.

3rd Raging Leap:

Leap towards the targeted position, Rooting all enemies in a 5m radius for 1.61/1.77

Deals 165/181 physical damage

Each Rending Bleed Charge deals 83/91 physical damage over 6s (stacks up to 3 times).

If the maximum amount of stacks is reached, the affected enemies' Healing Received is reduced by 12% for 5s.

spells.name: Deadly Chop
spells.description:
Strike the targeted enemy, dealing 502/551 physical damage.
Decreases damage resistances by 48/49 for 8s.
spells.description_html:
Strike the targeted enemy, dealing 502/551 physical damage.

Decreases damage resistances by 48/49 for 8s.

spells.name: Adrenaline Boost
spells.description:
Release an Adrenaline Boost, increasing all your damage by 25% and your Move Speed by 40% and your Attack Speed by 40% for up to 7s.
If you don't deal direct damage for 3.5s, the Adrenaline Boost will end early.
spells.description_html:
Release an Adrenaline Boost, increasing all your damage by 25% and your Move Speed by 40% and your Attack Speed by 40% for up to 7s.

If you don't deal direct damage for 3.5s, the Adrenaline Boost will end early.

spells.name: Battle Rush
spells.description: Charge toward the target, decreasing Healing Received of all enemies in a 5m radius by 20% for 3s. Increases Healing Received of up to 5 allies in a 5m radius by 20% for 4s.
spells.description_html: Charge toward the target, decreasing Healing Received of all enemies in a 5m radius by 20% for 3s. Increases Healing Received of up to 5 allies in a 5m radius by 20% for 4s.

spells.name: Internal Bleeding
spells.description: Swing your weapon in a 6m radius around you, dealing 193/212 physical damage. Causes all enemies hit to bleed, dealing 36/40 physical damage every 0.5s while the bleeding enemy is moving within the next 8s.
spells.description_html: Swing your weapon in a 6m radius around you, dealing 193/212 physical damage. Causes all enemies hit to bleed, dealing 36/40 physical damage every 0.5s while the bleeding enemy is moving within the next 8s.

spells.name: Raging Blades
spells.description:
Create two magic blades that circle you in a ring for 3s. The ring starts at a 2.5m radius and ends at a 6m radius from you. The blades deal 79/87 magical damage every 0.5s.
Increases all your damage by 4% per enemy hit (stacks up to 10 times) for 3s.
spells.description_html:
Create two magic blades that circle you in a ring for 3s. The ring starts at a 2.5m radius and ends at a 6m radius from you. The blades deal 79/87 magical damage every 0.5s.

Increases all your damage by 4% per enemy hit (stacks up to 10 times) for 3s.

spells.name: Deep Cuts
spells.description: Every 4 normal attacks, inflict a bleed on the targeted enemy dealing 58 physical damage over 1.5s.
spells.description_html: Every 4 normal attacks, inflict a bleed on the targeted enemy dealing 58 physical damage over 1.5s.

spells.name: Life Leech (Axes)
spells.description: Receive 15% of your normal attack damage as Life Steal.
spells.description_html: Receive 15% of your normal attack damage as Life Steal.

spells.name: Whirlwind
spells.description:
Spin around like a whirlwind, swinging your axe and dealing 203 physical damage every 0.5s in a 5m radius while channeling for 2.5s(can't be interrupted and can move while channeling).
Each consecutive hit on the same enemy increases the damage by 15
Each 0.5s spent channeling cost 10 Energy.

spells.name: Blood Bandit
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 10s.
1st Blood Draw
Throw an axe in the targeted direction, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit, based on the number of Rending Bleed Charge on them.
2nd Blood Bandit:
Throw an axe infused with blood magic in the targeted direction, dealing 363 physical damage
Heals you based on the number of Rending Bleed Charges on the first enemy hit.

Rending Bleed Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Damage: 578 | 660 | 743 | 825
Lifesteal: 743 | 743 | 743 | 743
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 10s.

1st Blood Draw

Throw an axe in the targeted direction, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit, based on the number of Rending Bleed Charge on them.

2nd Blood Bandit:

Throw an axe infused with blood magic in the targeted direction, dealing 363 physical damage

Heals you based on the number of Rending Bleed Charges on the first enemy hit.

  • Rending Bleed Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
  • Damage: 578 | 660 | 743 | 825

spells.name: Tear Apart
spells.description:
Cleave through all enemies in a 7m radius around you, dealing 453 physical damage. If any enemy hit has Rending Bleed Charges, all enemies hit receive the same number of charges as the enemy with the most charges.
Each Rending Bleed Charge deals 91 physical damage over 6s (stacks up to 3 times). 
If the maximum amount of stacks is reached, the affected enemies' Healing Received is reduced by 12% for 5s.

Create two magic blades that circle you in a ring for 3s. The ring starts at a 2.5m radius and ends at a 6m radius from you. The blades deal 79/87 magical damage every 0.5s.
Increases all your damage by 4% per enemy hit (stacks up to 10 times) for 3s.
spells.description_html:
Create two magic blades that circle you in a ring for 3s. The ring starts at a 2.5m radius and ends at a 6m radius from you. The blades deal 79/87 magical damage every 0.5s.

Increases all your damage by 4% per enemy hit (stacks up to 10 times) for 3s.

spells.name: Deep Cuts
spells.description: Every 4 normal attacks, inflict a bleed on the targeted enemy dealing 58 physical damage over 1.5s.
spells.description_html: Every 4 normal attacks, inflict a bleed on the targeted enemy dealing 58 physical damage over 1.5s.

spells.name: Life Leech (Axes)
spells.description: Receive 15% of your normal attack damage as Life Steal.
spells.description_html: Receive 15% of your normal attack damage as Life Steal.

spells.name: Bloody Reap
spells.description:
Reap all enemies in a 5m around' you after 1s, dealing 392 physical damage. Follow up with a second swing after 0.5s, dealing physical damage based on their current Health.
Target Health: Above 40%|Below 40%
Damage: 457|870
spells.description_html:
Reap all enemies in a 5m around' you after 1s, dealing 392 physical damage. Follow up with a second swing after 0.5s, dealing physical damage based on their current Health.
  • Target Health: Above 40%|Below 40%
  • Damage: 457|870

spells.name: Rending Strike
spells.description:
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 178/196 physical damage.
Applies one Rending Bleed Charge.
Each Rending Bleed Charge deals 83/91 over 6s (stacks up to 3 times).
If the maximum amount of stacks is reached, the affected enemies' Healing Received is reduced by 12% for 5s.
spells.description_html:
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 178/196 physical damage.

Applies one Rending Bleed Charge.

Each Rending Bleed Charge deals 83/91 over 6s (stacks up to 3 times).

If the maximum amount of stacks is reached, the affected enemies' Healing Received is reduced by 12% for 5s.

spells.name: Rending Spin
spells.description:
Swing the weapon around you dealing physical damage to all enemies in a 6m radius around you. Deals 248 to enemies that are at least 3m away and 149 to enemies that are closer than that. Also inflicts a Rending Bleed to each enemy hit, which lasts for 6s and deals 18 physical damage per second. (Stacks up to 3 times.)
If you build up 3 stacks, enemies hit will have their healing received reduced by 20% for 5s.
spells.description_html:
Swing the weapon around you dealing physical damage to all enemies in a 6m radius around you. Deals 248 to enemies that are at least 3m away and 149 to enemies that are closer than that. Also inflicts a Rending Bleed to each enemy hit, which lasts for 6s and deals 18 physical damage per second. (Stacks up to 3 times.)

If you build up 3 stacks, enemies hit will have their healing received reduced by 20% for 5s.

spells.name: Rending Rage
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2.5s.
1st and 2nd Rending Rage:
Cleave all enemies in a cone in the targeted direction, dealing 165/181 physical damage.
Applies one Rending Bleed Charge.
3rd Raging Leap:
Leap towards the targeted position, Rooting all enemies in a 5m radius for 1.61/1.77
Deals 165/181 physical damage
Each Rending Bleed Charge deals 83/91 physical damage over 6s (stacks up to 3 times).
If the maximum amount of stacks is reached, the affected enemies' Healing Received is reduced by 12% for 5s.
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2.5s.

1st and 2nd Rending Rage:

Applies one Rending Bleed Charge.

3rd Raging Leap:

Deals 165/181 physical damage

Each Rending Bleed Charge deals 83/91 physical damage over 6s (stacks up to 3 times).

If the maximum amount of stacks is reached, the affected enemies' Healing Received is reduced by 12% for 5s.

spells.name: Deadly Chop
spells.description:
Strike the targeted enemy, dealing 502/551 physical damage.
Decreases damage resistances by 48/49 for 8s.
spells.description_html:
Strike the targeted enemy, dealing 502/551 physical damage.

Decreases damage resistances by 48/49 for 8s.

spells.name: Adrenaline Boost
spells.description:
Release an Adrenaline Boost, increasing all your damage by 25% and your Move Speed by 40% and your Attack Speed by 40% for up to 7s.
If you don't deal direct damage for 3.5s, the Adrenaline Boost will end early.
spells.description_html:
Release an Adrenaline Boost, increasing all your damage by 25% and your Move Speed by 40% and your Attack Speed by 40% for up to 7s.

If you don't deal direct damage for 3.5s, the Adrenaline Boost will end early.

spells.name: Battle Rush
spells.description: Charge toward the target, decreasing Healing Received of all enemies in a 5m radius by 20% for 3s. Increases Healing Received of up to 5 allies in a 5m radius by 20% for 4s.
spells.description_html: Charge toward the target, decreasing Healing Received of all enemies in a 5m radius by 20% for 3s. Increases Healing Received of up to 5 allies in a 5m radius by 20% for 4s.

spells.name: Internal Bleeding
spells.description: Swing your weapon in a 6m radius around you, dealing 193/212 physical damage. Causes all enemies hit to bleed, dealing 36/40 physical damage every 0.5s while the bleeding enemy is moving within the next 8s.

spells.description:
Leap towards the targeted position and slam your axe into the ground dealing 769 physical damage to all enemies in a 4m radius.
Splits the earth in a cone in front of the impact area, throwing all enemies hit in the air for 0.6s. Decreases Max and current Health by 20% for 5s.

spells.name: Heroic Fighting
spells.description:
Every 4 normal attacks applies one Heroic Charge on you.
Each Heroic Charge increases your move and attack speed by 9% for 6s (stacks up to 3 times).
spells.description_html:
Every 4 normal attacks applies one Heroic Charge on you.

spells.description:
Strike the targeted enemy, dealing 257/282 physical damage.
Applies one Heroic Charge on you. 
Each Heroic Charge increases your Move Speed and Attack Speed by 12% for 6s (stacks up to 3 times).

Strike the targeted enemy, dealing 257/282 physical damage.

spells.name: Heroic Cleave
spells.description:
Swing your sword in a 6m radius around you, dealing 200/220 physical damage. Applies Heroic Charges on you based on the amount of enemies hit
Hits: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Heroic Charges: 0 | 1 | 1 | 2
Each Heroic Charge increases your Move Speed and Attack Speed by 12% for 6s (stacks up to 3 times).
spells.description_html:

Each Heroic Charge increases your Move Speed and Attack Speed by 12% for 6s (stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Blade Cyclone
spells.description:
Spin in the targeted direction, dealing 132/145 physical damage up to 3 times to all enemies you pass through.
If at least one Heroic Charge is active on you, the ability will consume one charge dealing 198/218 physical damage each time instead.

Spin in the targeted direction, dealing 132/145 physical damage up to 3 times to all enemies you pass through.

spells.name: Interrupt
spells.description: Deal 216 damage, and interrupt a spell being cast by your target.
spells.description_html: Deal 216 damage, and interrupt a spell being cast by your target.

spells.name: Splitting Slash
spells.description:
Split the earth in a 13m long line in the targeted direction, rooting all enemies hit for 1.99/2.19s.
Deals 446/490 physical damage.

spells.name: Hamstring
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 3s.
1st Hamstring:
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 257/283 physical damage.
Slows by 25% for 4.82/5.3s (stacks up to 2 times).
Having at least 1 Heroic Charge enables the next combo ability.
2nd Heroic Hamstring:
Leap towards the targeted position, applying the same effect again in a 3m radius.
Consumes one heroic Charge

spells.name: Parry Strike
spells.description:
Enter a defensive stance, becoming immune to damage while channeling for 0.8s (can't be interrupted).
Reflects 100% of the damage you take as magical damage. 
At the end of the channel, swing your sword in a 5m radius around you, dealing 264/290 physical damage.
spells.description_html:
Enter a defensive stance, becoming immune to damage while channeling for 0.8s (can't be interrupted).

Reflects 100% of the damage you take as magical damage.

At the end of the channel, swing your sword in a 5m radius around you, dealing 264/290 physical damage.

spells.name: Iron Will
spells.description:
Rush into battle, increasing your Move Speed by 10% and Defense by 25.926% for 3s.
Grants you immunity to purges while active. 
Applies one Heroic Charge on you. 
Each Heroic Charge increases your Move Speed and Attack Speed by 12% for 6s (stacks up to 3 times).

Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 3s.
1st Hamstring:
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 257/283 physical damage.
Slows by 25% for 4.82/5.3s (stacks up to 2 times).
Having at least 1 Heroic Charge enables the next combo ability.
2nd Heroic Hamstring:
Leap towards the targeted position, applying the same effect again in a 3m radius.
Consumes one heroic Charge
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 3s.

1st Hamstring:

Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 257/283 physical damage.

Slows by 25% for 4.82/5.3s (stacks up to 2 times).

Having at least 1 Heroic Charge enables the next combo ability.

2nd Heroic Hamstring:

Leap towards the targeted position, applying the same effect again in a 3m radius.

Consumes one heroic Charge

spells.name: Parry Strike
spells.description:
Enter a defensive stance, becoming immune to damage while channeling for 0.8s (can't be interrupted).
Reflects 100% of the damage you take as magical damage. 
At the end of the channel, swing your sword in a 5m radius around you, dealing 264/290 physical damage.
spells.description_html:
Enter a defensive stance, becoming immune to damage while channeling for 0.8s (can't be interrupted).

Reflects 100% of the damage you take as magical damage.

At the end of the channel, swing your sword in a 5m radius around you, dealing 264/290 physical damage.

spells.name: Iron Will
spells.description:
Rush into battle, increasing your Move Speed by 10% and Defense by 25.926% for 3s.
Grants you immunity to purges while active. 
Applies one Heroic Charge on you. 
Each Heroic Charge increases your Move Speed and Attack Speed by 12% for 6s (stacks up to 3 times).
spells.description_html:
Rush into battle, increasing your Move Speed by 10% and Defense by 25.926% for 3s.

Grants you immunity to purges while active.

Applies one Heroic Charge on you.

Each Heroic Charge increases your Move Speed and Attack Speed by 12% for 6s (stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Spinning Blades
spells.description:
Leap Towards the targeted position, becoming Immune to all Crowd Control effects until impact.
Throws enemies into the air for 0.6s
Deals 232 physical damage in a 5m radius on impact
Hitting at least one enemy will increase your Attack Speed and physical normal attack damage by 50% for 3s
spells.description_html:
Leap Towards the targeted position, becoming Immune to all Crowd Control effects until impact.

Throws enemies into the air for 0.6s

Deals 232 physical damage in a 5m radius on impact

Hitting at least one enemy will increase your Attack Speed and physical normal attack damage by 50% for 3s

spells.description: Every 4 normal attacks, inflict a bleed on the targeted enemy dealing 58 physical damage over 1.5s.

spells.name: Weakening
spells.description: Every normal attack decreases the damage the targeted enemy deals 2% for 2s. (stacks up to 5 times)
spells.description_html: Every normal attack decreases the damage the targeted enemy deals 2% for 2s. (stacks up to 5 times)

spells.name: Heroic Fighting
spells.description:
Every 4 normal attacks applies one Heroic Charge on you.
Each Heroic Charge increases your move and attack speed by 9% for 6s (stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Heroic Cleave

Swing your sword in a 6m radius around you, dealing 200/220 physical damage. Applies Heroic Charges on you based on the amount of enemies hit
Hits: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Heroic Charges: 0 | 1 | 1 | 2
Each Heroic Charge increases your Move Speed and Attack Speed by 12% for 6s (stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Blade Cyclone
spells.description:
Spin in the targeted direction, dealing 132/145 physical damage up to 3 times to all enemies you pass through.
If at least one Heroic Charge is active on you, the ability will consume one charge dealing 198/218 physical damage each time instead.

spells.name: Crescent Slash
spells.description:
Slice the air to shoot a demonic wave in the targeted direction, piercing through all enemies and dealing 660 magical damage.

2 Heroic Charges: Silences for 3.53s

spells.name: Majestic Smash
spells.description:
Swing your sword in a 6m radius around you, throwing all enemies hit in the air for 0.83s.
Deals 160 physical damage.
While the enemies are in the air you follow up with a vertical smash, dealing physical damage in a line in front of and behind you based on the amount of Heroic Charges on you.

Heroic Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
Damage: 315 | 508 | 762 | 1077
Consumes all your Heroic Charges.

spells.name: Giant Steps
spells.description:
Grow to giant size, increasing your Armor by 59, your Magic Resistance by 103 and your Attack Range by 50% for 10s.
Create an aura with a 7m radius around you, Slowing all enemies in it by 20%
While the ability is active, you can cast Giant Smash multiple times by recasting the ability.

Throws all enemies hit into the air for 0.6s.

spells.name: Knockback Shot

Hitting an enemy will reduce your Cast Times and will increase your Attack Speed by 50% for 5s.

spells.description:
Shoot a trap with a 2m radius into the ground at the targeted position, lasting 12s.

If the trap activates, your Move Speed is increased by 30% for 3s.

spells.description:

The beam slowly follows the cursor position.

spells.name: Create Opening
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo reset after 1.25s
1st Create Opening
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 218 physicl damage.
2nd Exploit Opening
Deals 218 physical damage.
Decreases damage resistances of the target by 30 for 3s.

Combine up to two abilities. The combo reset after 1.25s

1st Create Opening
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 218 physicl damage.

spells.name: Dragon Leap
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2s.
1st Dragon Leap: Dash towards the targeted position and kick all enemies, dealing 254 physical damage within a 2.5m radius. Hitting at least one enemy enables the next combo ability. 
2nd Dragon Punch: Leap towards the targeted position. Deals 308 physical damage to all enemies within a 2.5m radius. Throws all enemies hit into the air for 0.5s.

Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2s.

2nd Dragon Punch: Leap towards the targeted position. Deals 308 physical damage to all enemies within a 2.5m radius. Throws all enemies hit into the air for 0.5s.

spells.name: Fleet Footwork
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2s.
1st Roundhouse Kick:
Kick all enemyes in a Cone in the targeted direction, dealing 232 physical damage.
2nd Cross Step
Dash towards the targeted position,
increasing your normal attack damage by 100% for 5s.

spells.name: Shockwave
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2.5s
1st Shockwave
Shoot a Shockwave in the targeted direction, Piercing through all enemies
Deals 384 Physical damage to all enemies hit.
Hitting at least one enemy enables the next combo ability.
2nd Rushdown:
Dash to the first enemy hit by the Shockwave.

spells.name: Triple Kick
spells.description:
Dash towards the targeted position, repeatedly kicking all enemies you pass through.
Deals 134 physical damage (vs.players) / 218 physical damage (vs.mobs) up to three times.
Pulls up 1 enemy player along with you.
spells.description_html:
Dash towards the targeted position, repeatedly kicking all enemies you pass through.

spells.name: Backhand Strike
spells.description:
Strike the targeted enemy knocking them back by 15.9m Back.
Deals 236 physical damage. 
Knocked-back enemies that collide with the environment receive an additional 363 physical damage
Damage resistances will be reduced by 61 for 5s.
spells.description_html:
Strike the targeted enemy knocking them back by 15.9m Back.

Deals 236 physical damage.

Knocked-back enemies that collide with the environment receive an additional 363 physical damage

Damage resistances will be reduced by 61 for 5s.

spells.name: Counter
spells.description:
Enter a counter stance, increasing your Defenses by 75% while channeling for up to 1.2s (can't be interrupted).
Reflects 100% of the damage you take as magical damage.
Upon taking damage you instantly leap to the enemy, dealing 442 physical damage in a 4m radius.
Knocks all enemies hit in the air for 0.76s.

spells.name: Devastating Combo
spells.description:
Execute a two-punch combo on the targeted enemy while channeling for 1s (can't be interrupted).
The first punch deals 109 physical damage. Stuns for 1.1s .
The second punch deals 555 physical damage. 
Knocks the target back by 3m.

spells.name: Earth Crusher
spells.description:
Charge up the Earth Crusher, slowing yourself by 50% while channeling for up to 2s (can't be interrupted).
Deals magical damage to all enemies in an area around you.
The damage and radius is based on how long you have channeled (you may end the channel early).

Charge Up Time: 0.5s | 1s | 1.5s | 2s
Damage: 580 | 616 | 653 | 689
Radius: 5m | 7m | 8m | 9m
Channeling for the full duration will throw all enemies hit in the air for 1s.

Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2s.
1st Dragon Leap: Dash towards the targeted position and kick all enemies, dealing 254 physical damage within a 2.5m radius. Hitting at least one enemy enables the next combo ability. 
2nd Dragon Punch: Leap towards the targeted position. Deals 308 physical damage to all enemies within a 2.5m radius. Throws all enemies hit into the air for 0.5s.
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2s.

1st Dragon Leap: Dash towards the targeted position and kick all enemies, dealing 254 physical damage within a 2.5m radius. Hitting at least one enemy enables the next combo ability.

2nd Dragon Punch: Leap towards the targeted position. Deals 308 physical damage to all enemies within a 2.5m radius. Throws all enemies hit into the air for 0.5s.

spells.name: Fleet Footwork
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2s.
1st Roundhouse Kick:
Kick all enemyes in a Cone in the targeted direction, dealing 232 physical damage.
2nd Cross Step
Dash towards the targeted position,
increasing your normal attack damage by 100% for 5s.
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2s.

1st Roundhouse Kick:
Kick all enemyes in a Cone in the targeted direction, dealing 232 physical damage.

2nd Cross Step
Dash towards the targeted position,
increasing your normal attack damage by 100% for 5s.

spells.name: Shockwave
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2.5s
1st Shockwave
Shoot a Shockwave in the targeted direction, Piercing through all enemies
Deals 384 Physical damage to all enemies hit.
Hitting at least one enemy enables the next combo ability.
2nd Rushdown:
Dash to the first enemy hit by the Shockwave.
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2.5s

1st Shockwave
Shoot a Shockwave in the targeted direction, Piercing through all enemies
Deals 384 Physical damage to all enemies hit.
Hitting at least one enemy enables the next combo ability.

2nd Rushdown:
Dash to the first enemy hit by the Shockwave.

spells.name: Triple Kick
spells.description:
Dash towards the targeted position, repeatedly kicking all enemies you pass through.
Deals 134 physical damage (vs.players) / 218 physical damage (vs.mobs) up to three times.
Pulls up 1 enemy player along with you.
spells.description_html:
Dash towards the targeted position, repeatedly kicking all enemies you pass through.

Deals 134 physical damage (vs.players) / 218 physical damage (vs.mobs) up to three times.

Pulls up 1 enemy player along with you.

spells.name: Backhand Strike
spells.description:
Strike the targeted enemy knocking them back by 15.9m Back.
Deals 236 physical damage. 
Knocked-back enemies that collide with the environment receive an additional 363 physical damage
Damage resistances will be reduced by 61 for 5s.
spells.description_html:
Strike the targeted enemy knocking them back by 15.9m Back.

Deals 236 physical damage.

Knocked-back enemies that collide with the environment receive an additional 363 physical damage

Damage resistances will be reduced by 61 for 5s.

spells.name: Counter
spells.description:
Enter a counter stance, increasing your Defenses by 75% while channeling for up to 1.2s (can't be interrupted).
Reflects 100% of the damage you take as magical damage.
Upon taking damage you instantly leap to the enemy, dealing 442 physical damage in a 4m radius.
Knocks all enemies hit in the air for 0.76s.
spells.description_html:
Enter a counter stance, increasing your Defenses by 75% while channeling for up to 1.2s (can't be interrupted).

Reflects 100% of the damage you take as magical damage.

Upon taking damage you instantly leap to the enemy, dealing 442 physical damage in a 4m radius.

Knocks all enemies hit in the air for 0.76s.

spells.name: Devastating Combo
spells.description:
Execute a two-punch combo on the targeted enemy while channeling for 1s (can't be interrupted).
The first punch deals 109 physical damage. Stuns for 1.1s .
The second punch deals 555 physical damage. 
Knocks the target back by 3m.
spells.description_html:
Execute a two-punch combo on the targeted enemy while channeling for 1s (can't be interrupted).

The first punch deals 109 physical damage. Stuns for 1.1s .

The second punch deals 555 physical damage.

Knocks the target back by 3m.

spells.name: Rage
spells.description: Activates every time you take damage when your health is below 40%. Increases your damage by 15% and your Cooldown Modifier by 15% for 3 seconds.
spells.description_html: Activates every time you take damage when your health is below 40%. Increases your damage by 15% and your Cooldown Modifier by 15% for 3 seconds.

spells.name: Rushdown
spells.description: Every normal attack, your Move Speed increases by 20% for 2 seconds.
spells.description_html: Every normal attack, your Move Speed increases by 20% for 2 seconds.

spells.name: Hard to Catch
spells.description: Activates when you cast your weapon's second-slot ability. Increases your damage resistances by 40 and your Crowd Control Resistance by 100 for 3 seconds.
spells.description_html: Activates when you cast your weapon's second-slot ability. Increases your damage resistances by 40 and your Crowd Control Resistance by 100 for 3 seconds.

spells.name: Purifying Combination
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 5.
1st Dive Kick: 
Leap towards the targeted position, becoming immune to all Crowd Control effects until impact. 
Throws enemies in the air for 1s.
Deals 156 physical damage.
2nd Purifying Fist: 
Punch the area in front of you, dealing 852 physical damage.
Purges all buffs from all enemies hit (except for healing over time effects).
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 5.

1st Dive Kick:
Leap towards the targeted position, becoming immune to all Crowd Control effects until impact.
Throws enemies in the air for 1s.
Deals 156 physical damage.

2nd Purifying Fist:
Punch the area in front of you, dealing 852 physical damage.
Purges all buffs from all enemies hit (except for healing over time effects).

spells.name: Energetic
spells.description: Every normal attack, you restore 4 energy.
spells.description_html: Every normal attack, you restore 4 energy.

spells.name: Slow Poison
spells.description: Every normal attack slows the targeted enemy by 10%(vs. players)/40%(vs. mobs) for 1.61s/1.77s
spells.description_html: Every normal attack slows the targeted enemy by 10%(vs. players)/40%(vs. mobs) for 1.61s/1.77s

spells.name: Attack Speed
spells.description: Every 5 normal attacks, increases your Attack Speed by 40% for 3s.
spells.description_html: Every 5 normal attacks, increases your Attack Speed by 40% for 3s.

spells.name: Piercing Arrows
spells.description: Each normal attack decreases the targeted enermy's Defense by 1.961% for 3s(stacks up to 4 times).
spells.description_html: Each normal attack decreases the targeted enermy's Defense by 1.961% for 3s(stacks up to 4 times).

spells.name: Multishot
spells.description:
Release a volley of arrows in a cone in front of you, knocking back all enemies hit by 6.14m.
Deals 363 physical damage
spells.description_html:
Release a volley of arrows in a cone in front of you, knocking back all enemies hit by 6.14m.

Deals 363 physical damage

spells.name: Deadly Shot
spells.description:
Shoot an arrow in the targeted direction, piercing through all enemies, dealing 252 physical damage to all enemies hit.
Decreases damage resistances by 9 for 6s (stacks up to 3 times).
spells.description_html:
Shoot an arrow in the targeted direction, piercing through all enemies, dealing 252 physical damage to all enemies hit.

Decreases damage resistances by 9 for 6s (stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Poisoned Arrow
spells.description:
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 74 physical damage.
Poisons the targeted enemy, dealing 177 physical damage over 6s (stacks up to 3 times).
spells.description_html:
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 74 physical damage.

Poisons the targeted enemy, dealing 177 physical damage over 6s (stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Ray of Light
spells.description:
Fire an arrow into the sky, which lands after 0.6s at the targeted position.
Roots all enemies in a 3m radius for 2.76s
Deals 500 physical damage.
spells.description_html:
Fire an arrow into the sky, which lands after 0.6s at the targeted position.

Roots all enemies in a 3m radius for 2.76s
Deals 500 physical damage.

spells.name: Frost Shot
spells.description:
Fire an ice arrow 2m in front of you, which explodes in a 4m radius.
Knocks you back by 13m.
Deals 145 physical damage to all enemies hit.
Slows for 40% for 7.68s
spells.description_html:
Fire an ice arrow 2m in front of you, which explodes in a 4m radius.

Knocks you back by 13m.
Deals 145 physical damage to all enemies hit.
Slows for 40% for 7.68s

spells.name: Speed Shot
spells.description:
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 210 physical damage.
Increases your Move Speed by 20% and your Attack Speed by 50% for 5s.
spells.description_html:
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 210 physical damage.

Increases your Move Speed by 20% and your Attack Speed by 50% for 5s.

spells.name: Explosive Arrows
spells.description: Enchant your next 10 arrows for hte next 15s, causing them to explode on impact. Each explosion deals 68 physical damage to all enemies in a 5m radius around the targeted enemy (also works for arrows from spells).
spells.description_html: Enchant your next 10 arrows for hte next 15s, causing them to explode on impact. Each explosion deals 68 physical damage to all enemies in a 5m radius around the targeted enemy (also works for arrows from spells).

spells.name: Magic Arrow
spells.description:
Shoot an arrow in the targeted direction, dealing magical damage upon impact with an enemy based on the time the arrow has been flying.
Time passed: 0s | 1.5s
Damage (vs. players): 492 | 666
Damage (vs. mobs): 580 | 810

spells.name: Enchanted Quiver
spells.description:
Enchant up to 6 of your arrows for the next 8s.
While you hold enchanted arrows, your attack speed is increased by 50% and your physical attack damage by 240%.
Each normal attack consumes 1 enchanted arrow.
Recast the ability within 8s to dash to targeted position and enchant 4 more arrows (cannot exceed 6 arrows).

Shoot a storm-infused arrow in the targeted diercton, which explodes into a 5m radius stormcloud lasting 4.8s upon impact with an enemy. Deals 76 magical damage every 0.3s.

spells.name: Lunging Strike
spells.description:
Stab all enemies in a 9m long line in front of you, dealing 257/283 physical damage.
Slows by 10% for 4.82s/5.3s.
Applies one Spirit Spear Charge on you for each enemy hit.
Each Spirit Spear Charge increases your physical normal attack damage by 28% (stacks up to 3 times) for 8s.

spells.name: Spirit Spear
spells.description:
Enchant your spear, increasing your Attack Range by 40% for 8s. Applies one Spirit Spear Charge on you.
The Energy Cost increases based on the amount of Spirit Spear Charges on you

Energy Cost Increase: 0 | 10/11 | 20/22 | 30/33

spells.description:
Meditate, gathering your Inner Focus while channeling for 1.8s.
Increases all damage you deal and the duration of your Crowd Control effects by 4%, and your Move Speed by 5% for each 0.2s channeled (stacks up to 10 times). Lasts 6s after the channel has ended.

spells.name: Cripple
spells.description:
Strike the targeted enemy, dealing 350/384 magical damage.
Slows by 15% for 8.04s/8.83s.
Purges all Move Speed buffs.

spells.description:
Renew the targeted ally's strength, applying one Rejuvenation Charge . Each Rejuvenation Charge restores
 146 Health over 8s ( stacks up to 3 times). If the target already has 3 Rejuvenation Charges , all charges will be consumed and you restore 20 Energy .

spells.name: Thorn Growth
spells.description:
Conjure a Thorn Growth within a 3m radius at the targeted area, lasting 4s.
Deals 46 magical damage (vs. players)/ 69 magical damage (vs. mobs) every 0.5s.
Whenever the ability deals damage, it will apply one Thorns Charge to all enemies within the growth (stacks up to 5 times).
Slows by 25%.
The ability can be recast again within 3s up to 3 times.
Thorns Charges are consumed by your normal attacks and deal an additional 80 magical damage.

Collecting the flower gives you the ability to throw it at a targeted location; on impact it heals and applies Rejuvenation Charges on up to 5 allies within a 3m radius based on grow time (only the caster can collect the flower)
Grow Time: 0s / 2.5s / 5s = Heal: 17 / 41 / 70 = Rejuvenation Charges: 1 / 2 / 3
spells.description_html:
Collecting the flower gives you the ability to throw it at a targeted location; on impact it heals and applies Rejuvenation Charges on up to 5 allies within a 3m radius based on grow time (only the caster can collect the flower)

Grow Time: 0s / 2.5s / 5s = Heal: 17 / 41 / 70 = Rejuvenation Charges: 1 / 2 / 3

spells.name: Revitalize
spells.description: Revitalizes an ally, restoring 158 health and 22 energy every 1s , while channeling for 4.5s (taking damage reduces the channel time).
spells.description_html: Revitalizes an ally, restoring 158 health and 22 energy every 1s , while channeling for 4.5s (taking damage reduces the channel time).

spells.name: Cleanse Heal
spells.description:
Revitalise up to 5 allies in a 4m radius of the target position, healing them based on the number of the number of Rejuvenation Charges on them.
 Cleanses all Crowd Control effects and debuffs (except damage over time effects).

Rejuvenation Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 
Heal: 114 | 147 | 188 | 245 
Consumes one of the targets Rejuvenation Charges.
spells.description_html:
Revitalise up to 5 allies in a 4m radius of the target position, healing them based on the number of the number of Rejuvenation Charges on them.

Cleanses all Crowd Control effects and debuffs (except damage over time effects).

  • Rejuvenation Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
  • Heal: 114 | 147 | 188 | 245

Consumes one of the targets Rejuvenation Charges.

spells.name: Brambleseed
spells.description:
Throw seeds along a 16m long line in targeted direction, dealing 124 magical damage.
After a 1s delay brambles will grow along the line, dealing 372 magical damage.
Throws all enemies hit in the air for 0.49s
spells.description_html:
Throw seeds along a 16m long line in targeted direction, dealing 124 magical damage.

After a 1s delay brambles will grow along the line, dealing 372 magical damage.

Throws all enemies hit in the air for 0.49s

spells.name: Protection of Nature
spells.description: Heals a targeted ally for 72 and protects, increasing the target's damage resistances by 64 and Healing Received by 35% for 6s .
spells.description_html: Heals a targeted ally for 72 and protects, increasing the target's damage resistances by 64 and Healing Received by 35% for 6s .

spells.name: Rejuvenating Breeze
spells.description:
Release a Rejuvenating Breeze from the targeted ally, increasing the target's damage resistance by 84 for 2s . The breeze hits up to 10 allies within a 15m radius around the target. All allies hit receive the same number of Rejuvenation Charges as the targeted ally has.
Each Rejuvenation Charge restores 127 Health over 8s ( stacks up to 3 times).
spells.description_html:
Release a Rejuvenating Breeze from the targeted ally, increasing the target's damage resistance by 84 for 2s . The breeze hits up to 10 allies within a 15m radius around the target. All allies hit receive the same number of Rejuvenation Charges as the targeted ally has.

Each Rejuvenation Charge restores 127 Health over 8s ( stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Well of Life
spells.description:
Create a Well of Life with 7m radius at the targeted position, lasting 6s .
Heals up to 10 allies within the Well for 78 Health every 1s .
spells.description_html:
Create a Well of Life with 7m radius at the targeted position, lasting 6s .

Heals up to 10 allies within the Well for 78 Health every 1s .

spells.name: Energetic
spells.description: Every normal attack, you restore 4 energy.
spells.description_html: Every normal attack, you restore 4 energy.

spells.name: Adrenaline Driven Charity
spells.description: After every 4 spells cast,increase your Healing Cast by 20% for 3s.
spells.description_html: After every 4 spells cast,increase your Healing Cast by 20% for 3s.

spells.name: Calmness
spells.description: After every 5 spells cast increase your damage resistances by 70/71 for 3s.
spells.description_html: After every 5 spells cast increase your damage resistances by 70/71 for 3s.

spells.name: Rejuvenation
spells.description:
Renew the targeted ally's strength, applying one Rejuvenation Charge . Each Rejuvenation Charge restores
 146 Health over 8s ( stacks up to 3 times). If the target already has 3 Rejuvenation Charges , all charges will be consumed and you restore 20 Energy .
spells.description_html:
Renew the targeted ally's strength, applying one Rejuvenation Charge . Each Rejuvenation Charge restores

146 Health over 8s ( stacks up to 3 times). If the target already has 3 Rejuvenation Charges , all charges will be consumed and you restore 20 Energy .

spells.name: Thorn Growth
spells.description:
Conjure a Thorn Growth within a 3m radius at the targeted area, lasting 4s.
Deals 46 magical damage (vs. players)/ 69 magical damage (vs. mobs) every 0.5s.
Whenever the ability deals damage, it will apply one Thorns Charge to all enemies within the growth (stacks up to 5 times).
Slows by 25%.
The ability can be recast again within 3s up to 3 times.
Thorns Charges are consumed by your normal attacks and deal an additional 80 magical damage.

spells.name: Circle of Life
spells.description:
Mend the wounds of up to 5 allies within a 11m radius , healing them based on the amount of Rejuvenation Charges on the ally .
Rejuvenation Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 
Healing: 175 | 217 | 282 | 370 
If you have 3 or more Thorn Charges active on you, you will root all enemies within the heal radius for 2.32s.
Deals 234 magical damage .

spells.description_html: After every 5 spells cast increase your damage resistances by 70/71 for 3s.

spells.name: Rejuvenation
spells.description:
Renew the targeted ally's strength, applying one Rejuvenation Charge . Each Rejuvenation Charge restores
 146 Health over 8s ( stacks up to 3 times). If the target already has 3 Rejuvenation Charges , all charges will be consumed and you restore 20 Energy .
spells.description_html:
Renew the targeted ally's strength, applying one Rejuvenation Charge . Each Rejuvenation Charge restores

146 Health over 8s ( stacks up to 3 times). If the target already has 3 Rejuvenation Charges , all charges will be consumed and you restore 20 Energy .

spells.name: Thorn Growth
spells.description:
Conjure a Thorn Growth within a 3m radius at the targeted area, lasting 4s.
Deals 46 magical damage (vs. players)/ 69 magical damage (vs. mobs) every 0.5s.
Whenever the ability deals damage, it will apply one Thorns Charge to all enemies within the growth (stacks up to 5 times).
Slows by 25%.
The ability can be recast again within 3s up to 3 times.
Thorns Charges are consumed by your normal attacks and deal an additional 80 magical damage.
spells.description_html:
Conjure a Thorn Growth within a 3m radius at the targeted area, lasting 4s.

Deals 46 magical damage (vs. players)/ 69 magical damage (vs. mobs) every 0.5s.

Whenever the ability deals damage, it will apply one Thorns Charge to all enemies within the growth (stacks up to 5 times).

Slows by 25%.

The ability can be recast again within 3s up to 3 times.

Thorns Charges are consumed by your normal attacks and deal an additional 80 magical damage.

spells.name: Rejuvenating Flower
spells.description:
Collecting the flower gives you the ability to throw it at a targeted location; on impact it heals and applies Rejuvenation Charges on up to 5 allies within a 3m radius based on grow time (only the caster can collect the flower)
Grow Time: 0s / 2.5s / 5s = Heal: 17 / 41 / 70 = Rejuvenation Charges: 1 / 2 / 3
spells.description_html:
Collecting the flower gives you the ability to throw it at a targeted location; on impact it heals and applies Rejuvenation Charges on up to 5 allies within a 3m radius based on grow time (only the caster can collect the flower)

Grow Time: 0s / 2.5s / 5s = Heal: 17 / 41 / 70 = Rejuvenation Charges: 1 / 2 / 3

spells.name: Revitalize
spells.description: Revitalizes an ally, restoring 158 health and 22 energy every 1s , while channeling for 4.5s (taking damage reduces the channel time).
spells.description_html: Revitalizes an ally, restoring 158 health and 22 energy every 1s , while channeling for 4.5s (taking damage reduces the channel time).

spells.name: Cleanse Heal
spells.description:
Revitalise up to 5 allies in a 4m radius of the target position, healing them based on the number of the number of Rejuvenation Charges on them.
 Cleanses all Crowd Control effects and debuffs (except damage over time effects).

Rejuvenation Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 
Heal: 114 | 147 | 188 | 245 
Consumes one of the targets Rejuvenation Charges.
spells.description_html:
Revitalise up to 5 allies in a 4m radius of the target position, healing them based on the number of the number of Rejuvenation Charges on them.

Cleanses all Crowd Control effects and debuffs (except damage over time effects).

  • Rejuvenation Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3
  • Heal: 114 | 147 | 188 | 245

Consumes one of the targets Rejuvenation Charges.

spells.name: Brambleseed
spells.description:
Throw seeds along a 16m long line in targeted direction, dealing 124 magical damage.
After a 1s delay brambles will grow along the line, dealing 372 magical damage.
Throws all enemies hit in the air for 0.49s
spells.description_html:
Throw seeds along a 16m long line in targeted direction, dealing 124 magical damage.

After a 1s delay brambles will grow along the line, dealing 372 magical damage.

Throws all enemies hit in the air for 0.49s

spells.name: Protection of Nature
spells.description: Heals a targeted ally for 72 and protects, increasing the target's damage resistances by 64 and Healing Received by 35% for 6s .
spells.description_html: Heals a targeted ally for 72 and protects, increasing the target's damage resistances by 64 and Healing Received by 35% for 6s .

spells.name: Rejuvenating Breeze
spells.description:
Release a Rejuvenating Breeze from the targeted ally, increasing the target's damage resistance by 84 for 2s . The breeze hits up to 10 allies within a 15m radius around the target. All allies hit receive the same number of Rejuvenation Charges as the targeted ally has.
Each Rejuvenation Charge restores 127 Health over 8s ( stacks up to 3 times).
spells.description_html:
Release a Rejuvenating Breeze from the targeted ally, increasing the target's damage resistance by 84 for 2s . The breeze hits up to 10 allies within a 15m radius around the target. All allies hit receive the same number of Rejuvenation Charges as the targeted ally has.

Each Rejuvenation Charge restores 127 Health over 8s ( stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Soul Link
spells.description:
Bind the souls of two targets together, linking them for 7s .
If 2 allies are linked: Transfers 50% of the damage taken by one target to the other target. Transfers 100% of the Healing Received by one target to the other target.
If an ally and an enemy are linked: Transfers 30% of the Healing Received by the enemy to the ally. Transfers 10% of the damage the ally takes to the enemy. 
If 2 enemies are linked: Deals 50% of the damage one target takes (after damage resistances) to the other enemy as true damage .
spells.description_html:
Bind the souls of two targets together, linking them for 7s .

If 2 allies are linked:
Transfers 50% of the damage taken by one target to the other target. Transfers 100% of the Healing Received by one target to the other target.

If an ally and an enemy are linked:
Transfers 30% of the Healing Received by the enemy to the ally. Transfers 10% of the damage the ally takes to the enemy.

If 2 enemies are linked:
Deals 50% of the damage one target takes (after damage resistances) to the other enemy as true damage .

spells.name: Deep Cuts
spells.description: Every 4 normal attacks, inflict a bleed on the targeted enemy dealing 58 physical damage over 1.5s.
spells.description_html: Every 4 normal attacks, inflict a bleed on the targeted enemy dealing 58 physical damage over 1.5s.

spells.name: Attack Speed
spells.description: Every 5 normal attacks, increases your Attack Speed by 40% for 3s.
spells.description_html: Every 5 normal attacks, increases your Attack Speed by 40% for 3s.

spells.name: Life Leech (Daggers)
spells.description: Every normal attack steals 15% of the Health the enemy has lost.
spells.description_html: Every normal attack steals 15% of the Health the enemy has lost.

spells.name: Sunder Armor
spells.description: Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 244 physical damage . Applies one Sunder Armor Charge. Each Sunder Armor Charge decreases damage resistances by 12 (vs players) / 18 (vs mobs) for 8s ( stacks up to 3 times).
spells.description_html: Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 244 physical damage . Applies one Sunder Armor Charge. Each Sunder Armor Charge decreases damage resistances by 12 (vs players) / 18 (vs mobs) for 8s ( stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Deadly Swipe
spells.description:
Leap towards the targeted position, dealing 258/284 physical damage to all enemies in a 3m radius. Applies one Assassin Spirit on you for every enemy hit.
Hitting at least one enemy will restore 21/23 Energy. 
Each Assassin Spirit Charge increases all your damage by 6% for 8s(stacks up to 3 times).
spells.description_html:
Leap towards the targeted position, dealing 258/284 physical damage to all enemies in a 3m radius.
Applies one Assassin Spirit on you for every enemy hit.

Hitting at least one enemy will restore 21/23 Energy.

Each Assassin Spirit Charge increases all your damage by 6% for 8s(stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Assassin Spirit
spells.description: Invoke your Assassin Spirit, applying an Assassin Spirit Charge on you every 3s . Decreases your Defense by 3.846% . The ability can last up to 15s but can be deactivated earlier . Each Assassin Spirit Charge increases all your damage by 6% for 8s
spells.description_html: Invoke your Assassin Spirit, applying an Assassin Spirit Charge on you every 3s . Decreases your Defense by 3.846% . The ability can last up to 15s but can be deactivated earlier . Each Assassin Spirit Charge increases all your damage by 6% for 8s

spells.name: Throwing Blades
spells.description: Throw three Throwing Blades in a cone in the targeted direction, piercing through all enemies and dealing 128 magical damage . Increases your Move Speed by 25% , and all damage you deal by 15% , for each unique enemy hit ( stacks up to 3 times) for 5s .
spells.description_html: Throw three Throwing Blades in a cone in the targeted direction, piercing through all enemies and dealing 128 magical damage . Increases your Move Speed by 25% , and all damage you deal by 15% , for each unique enemy hit ( stacks up to 3 times) for 5s .

spells.name: Dash
spells.description: Dash towards the targeted position. Increases all damage you deal by 15% for 4s .
spells.description_html: Dash towards the targeted position. Increases all damage you deal by 15% for 4s .

spells.name: Forbidden Stab
spells.description: Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 308 physical damage . Reduces Healing Received and Healing Cast by 40% for 5s .
spells.description_html: Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 308 physical damage . Reduces Healing Received and Healing Cast by 40% for 5s .

spells.name: Shadow Edge
spells.description: Throw a knife in the targeted direction, stunning the first enemy hit for 1.83s . Hitting an enemy will pull you behind the hit enemy .
spells.description_html: Throw a knife in the targeted direction, stunning the first enemy hit for 1.83s . Hitting an enemy will pull you behind the hit enemy .

spells.name: Chain Slash
spells.description: Charge towards the targeted enemy, hitting the target and then charging to the closest enemy within 6m of the enemy you hit last (up to 4 different targets), dealing 439 physical damage with each hit. Turns you invisible and grants immunity to damage while charging.
spells.description_html: Charge towards the targeted enemy, hitting the target and then charging to the closest enemy within 6m of the enemy you hit last (up to 4 different targets), dealing 439 physical damage with each hit. Turns you invisible and grants immunity to damage while charging.

spells.description:
Land a devastating blow on the targeted enemy, dealing physical damage based on the amount of Assassin Spirit Charges on you or Sunder Armor Charges on the enemy. Inflicts a bleed dealing physical damage based on the amount of Assassin Spirit Charges on you or Sunder Armor Charges on the enemy over 4s . Reduces Healing Received by 20% for 4s .
Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 
Direct Damage: 336 | 530 | 797 | 1130 
Bleed Damage: 111 | 177 | 266 | 377 

Consumes all Assassin Spirit and Sunder Armor Charges on you and the target.

spells.name: Blood Ritual
spells.description:
Infuse your blade with blood magic and swing it in a cone in front of you, dealing 354 magical damage immediately and another 153 magical damage over 1.4s to all enemies hit. (Does not stack).
Deals 110 physical damage over 3.5s to yourself ( stacks up to 3 times).
The ability can be cast again within 3s for up to 3 times, increasing its cooldown by 5s per cast.

spells.name: Merciless Finish
spells.description:
Swing your daggers in a cone in front of you while leaping backwards 8m . Deals physical damage based on the number of Assassin Spirit Charges on you or Sunder Armor Charges on the target.
Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 
Damage: 289 | 461 | 691 | 976 
Consumes all applied Assassin Spirit Charges or Sunder Armor Charges

spells.name: Concussive Combo
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 6s.
1st and 2nd: Flowing Blow
Land a Flowing Blow on the targeted enemy, dealing 248 physical damage in a cone in front of you.
3rd: Concussive Blow
Land an overhead Concussive Blow on the target, dealing 397 physical damage and stuns for 2.31s.
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 6s.

spells.name: Whirling Strikes
spells.description:
Whirl your staff around, dealing 126 physical damage every 0.25s in a 5m radius while channeling for up to 0.6s (can move while channeling).
Hitting at least one enemy will reduce this ability's cooldown by 12% for 5s (stacks up to 3 times).
spells.description_html:
Whirl your staff around, dealing 126 physical damage every 0.25s in a 5m radius while channeling for up to 0.6s (can move while channeling).

Hitting at least one enemy will reduce this ability's cooldown by 12% for 5s (stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Cartwheel
spells.description:
Dash towards the targeted position, knocking back all enemies you pass through by 3m.
Deals 221 physical damage.
If you take damage while dashing, your damage resistances will be increased by 30 and your Move Speed by 20% for 3s.
spells.description_html:
Dash towards the targeted position, knocking back all enemies you pass through by 3m.

Deals 221 physical damage.

If you take damage while dashing, your damage resistances will be increased by 30 and your Move Speed by 20% for 3s.

spells.name: Gale Dance
spells.description:
Swing your weapon up to 3 times in the target direction, dealing 265 physical damage each hit.
Hitting an enemy with all three swings increases your Move Speed by 30% and normal attack damage by 50% for 4s.
spells.description_html:
Swing your weapon up to 3 times in the target direction, dealing 265 physical damage each hit.

Hitting an enemy with all three swings increases your Move Speed by 30% and normal attack damage by 50% for 4s.

spells.name: Stun Run
spells.description:
Start running, increasing your Move Speed by 30% for 4s.
The first attack while running will stun the targeted enemy for 3.4s.

spells.name: Forceful Swing
spells.description:
Swing your staff in a 6m radius around you, knocking back all enemies hit by 6.87m.
Deals 172 physical damage.
Decreases all damage dealt by 20% for 8s.
Affected enemy players will be unable to do normal attacks.
Affected mobs hit will have their Attack Speed reduced by 50%.

Mobs will be thrown in the air for 0.6s.

Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 248 physical damage.
Roots the target for 4.03s.
Knocks all untargeted enemies within a 6m radius around the target 19.35m back.
Mobs will be thrown in the air for 0.6s.
spells.description_html:
Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 248 physical damage.

Roots the target for 4.03s.

Knocks all untargeted enemies within a 6m radius around the target 19.35m back.
Mobs will be thrown in the air for 0.6s.

spells.name: Life Leech (Quarterstaffs)
spells.description: Receive 15% of your normal attack damage as Life Steal.
spells.description_html: Receive 15% of your normal attack damage as Life Steal.

spells.name: Fatal Blade
spells.description: Throw a demonic version of your weapon at the targeted position, which lands and spins in a 5m radius for 5s. Deals 83 physical damage every 0.75s. Slows all enemies within its radius by 8% and reduces all damage they deal by 22%(vs players)/ 10%(vs mobs) every 0.75s(stacks up to 4 times). The debuff lasts for 6s after leaving the radius.
spells.description_html:
Throw a demonic version of your weapon at the targeted position, which lands and spins in a 5m radius for 5s.
Deals 83 physical damage every 0.75s.
Slows all enemies within its radius by 8% and reduces all damage they deal by 22%(vs players)/ 10%(vs mobs) every 0.75s(stacks up to 4 times).
The debuff lasts for 6s after leaving the radius.

spells.name: Concussive Combo
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 6s.
1st and 2nd: Flowing Blow
Land a Flowing Blow on the targeted enemy, dealing 248 physical damage in a cone in front of you.
3rd: Concussive Blow
Land an overhead Concussive Blow on the target, dealing 397 physical damage and stuns for 2.31s.
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 6s.

1st and 2nd: Flowing Blow
Land a Flowing Blow on the targeted enemy, dealing 248 physical damage in a cone in front of you.

3rd: Concussive Blow
Land an overhead Concussive Blow on the target, dealing 397 physical damage and stuns for 2.31s.

spells.name: Whirling Strikes
spells.description:
Whirl your staff around, dealing 126 physical damage every 0.25s in a 5m radius while channeling for up to 0.6s (can move while channeling).
Hitting at least one enemy will reduce this ability's cooldown by 12% for 5s (stacks up to 3 times).
spells.description_html:
Whirl your staff around, dealing 126 physical damage every 0.25s in a 5m radius while channeling for up to 0.6s (can move while channeling).

Hitting at least one enemy will reduce this ability's cooldown by 12% for 5s (stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Cartwheel
spells.description:
Dash towards the targeted position, knocking back all enemies you pass through by 3m.
Deals 221 physical damage.
If you take damage while dashing, your damage resistances will be increased by 30 and your Move Speed by 20% for 3s.
spells.description_html:
Dash towards the targeted position, knocking back all enemies you pass through by 3m.

Deals 221 physical damage.

If you take damage while dashing, your damage resistances will be increased by 30 and your Move Speed by 20% for 3s.

spells.name: Gale Dance
spells.description:
Swing your weapon up to 3 times in the target direction, dealing 265 physical damage each hit.
Hitting an enemy with all three swings increases your Move Speed by 30% and normal attack damage by 50% for 4s.
spells.description_html:
Swing your weapon up to 3 times in the target direction, dealing 265 physical damage each hit.

Hitting an enemy with all three swings increases your Move Speed by 30% and normal attack damage by 50% for 4s.

spells.name: Stun Run
spells.description:
Start running, increasing your Move Speed by 30% for 4s.
The first attack while running will stun the targeted enemy for 3.4s.
spells.description_html:
Start running, increasing your Move Speed by 30% for 4s.

The first attack while running will stun the targeted enemy for 3.4s.

spells.name: Forceful Swing
spells.description:
Swing your staff in a 6m radius around you, knocking back all enemies hit by 6.87m.
Deals 172 physical damage.
Decreases all damage dealt by 20% for 8s.
Affected enemy players will be unable to do normal attacks.
Affected mobs hit will have their Attack Speed reduced by 50%.
spells.description_html:
Swing your staff in a 6m radius around you, knocking back all enemies hit by 6.87m.

Deals 172 physical damage. Decreases all damage dealt by 20% for 8s.

Affected enemy players will be unable to do normal attacks.
Affected mobs hit will have their Attack Speed reduced by 50%.

spells.name: Mystic Rocks
spells.description:
Conjure a cloud of Mystic Rocks in a 6m radius around you, slowing all enemies within it by 50%. Reduces their Healing Received by 35%. Increases your damage resistances by 60.
Negates all your Healing Received. Purges all healing over time effects on you.
The ability lasts up to 15s but can be deactivated sooner.

spells.name: Soul Shaker
spells.description:
Shake the ground along a 20m long line in the targeted direction, dealing 414 physical damage.
Leaves behind a wall of energy that lasts 3.5s, rooting all enemies who touch it for its duration.
The spell can be recast again within 3s, increasing its cooldown by 20s.
spells.description_html:
Shake the ground along a 20m long line in the targeted direction, dealing 414 physical damage.

Leaves behind a wall of energy that lasts 3.5s, rooting all enemies who touch it for its duration.

The spell can be recast again within 3s, increasing its cooldown by 20s.

spells.name: Energetic
spells.description: Every normal attack, you restore 4 energy.
spells.description_html: Every normal attack, you restore 4 energy.

spells.name: Burn
spells.description: Every normal attack sets the enemy on fire, dealing an additional 23 per second for 2.5s
spells.description_html: Every normal attack sets the enemy on fire, dealing an additional 23 per second for 2.5s

spells.name: Aggressive Caster
spells.description: Every 4 activated spells, you gain a cast speed buff of 40% for 3s.
spells.description_html: Every 4 activated spells, you gain a cast speed buff of 40% for 3s.

spells.name: Fire Bolt
spells.description:
Shoot a firey bolt at the targeted enemy, dealing 178/196 magical damage.
Ignites the targeted enemy, dealing 57/63 magical damage over 3.3s (stacks up to 5 times).
spells.description_html:
Shoot a firey bolt at the targeted enemy, dealing 178/196 magical damage.

Ignites the targeted enemy, dealing 57/63 magical damage over 3.3s (stacks up to 5 times).

spells.name: Burning Field
spells.description:
Fire a burning orb at the targeted position, dealing 149/164 magical damage in a 3m radius.
Sets the ground on fire in a 3m radius for 4s.
Deals 158/173 magical damage (vs players)/ 57/63 magical damage (vs mobs) every 0.5s.
spells.description_html:
Fire a burning orb at the targeted position, dealing 149/164 magical damage in a 3m radius.

Sets the ground on fire in a 3m radius for 4s.
Deals 158/173 magical damage (vs players)/ 57/63 magical damage (vs mobs) every 0.5s.

spells.name: Searing Flame
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 5s.
1st, 2nd & 3rd Searing Flame:
Fire a Searing Flame in the targeted direction, dealing 284/312 magical damage to the first enemy hit.
Ignites the enemy, dealing 126/139 magical damage over 4s.
Hit at least one enemy to continue the combo.
4th Furious Flame:
Fire a Furious Flame in the targeted direction, dealing 548/602 magical damage. Ignites the enemy, dealing 126/139 magical damage over 4s.
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 5s.

1st, 2nd & 3rd Searing Flame:
Fire a Searing Flame in the targeted direction, dealing 284/312 magical damage to the first enemy hit.
Ignites the enemy, dealing 126/139 magical damage over 4s.
Hit at least one enemy to continue the combo.

4th Furious Flame:
Fire a Furious Flame in the targeted direction, dealing 548/602 magical damage. Ignites the enemy, dealing 126/139 magical damage over 4s.

spells.name: Pyroblast
spells.description:
Charge up a Pyroblast, while channeling for up to 1.2s ( You can aim while channeling).
Deals magical damage upon impact with an enemy within a 4m radius based on how long you have channeled.

Time: 0s / 0.6s / 1.2s
Damage: 574 / 804 / 1033
If you channel for 1.2s the Pyroblast will also knock back all enemies hit by 3.5m.
spells.description_html:
Charge up a Pyroblast, while channeling for up to 1.2s ( You can aim while channeling).

Deals magical damage upon impact with an enemy within a 4m radius based on how long you have channeled.

  • Time: 0s / 0.6s / 1.2s
  • Damage: 574 / 804 / 1033

If you channel for 1.2s the Pyroblast will also knock back all enemies hit by 3.5m.

spells.name: Wall of Flames
spells.description:
Create a 14m wide firewall in front of you, lasting 5s.
Sets all enemies touching it aflame, dealing 416/457 magical damage over 3s.
Enemies set aflame will flee from you for 0.5s (mobs flee only once).
spells.description_html:
Create a 14m wide firewall in front of you, lasting 5s.

Sets all enemies touching it aflame, dealing 416/457 magical damage over 3s.
Enemies set aflame will flee from you for 0.5s (mobs flee only once).

spells.name: Fire Wave
spells.description:
Unleash a cone of fire in front of you igniting all enemies hit, dealing 497/546 magical damage over 4s.
Enemies already affected by Fire Bolt, Burning Field, or Searing Flame will take an additional 201/221 magical damage.
Knocks back all enemies hit by 2.87m.
spells.description_html:
Unleash a cone of fire in front of you igniting all enemies hit, dealing 497/546 magical damage over 4s.

Enemies already affected by Fire Bolt, Burning Field, or Searing Flame will take an additional 201/221 magical damage.
Knocks back all enemies hit by 2.87m.

spells.name: Fire Artillery
spells.description:
Throw fiery orbs at the targeted enemy every 1.5s while channeling for 3s.
Each orb deals 158/173 magical damage in a 3m radius.
Leaves a burning patch, igniting all enemies on it for 6s.
Deals 43/47 magical damage (vs. players) / 16/17 magical damage (vs. mobs) every 0.5s (stacks up to 4 times).

spells.name: Chain Missile
spells.description:
Shoot a Chain Missile in the targeted direction, dealing 379/416 magical damage to the first enemy hit. Upon hitting an enemy, it will jump to the closest enemy within 7m of the last enemy hit, dealing 72/79 magical damage to all following enemies(can hit up to 3 targets; can't hit the same target multiple times). Applies one Arcane Charge to all enemies hit.
Arcane Charges are consumed whenever you deal direct damage to the affected target, dealing an additional 158/173 magical damage(Chain Missile damage does not count as direct damage).

Applies one Arcane Charge to all enemies hit.

Arcane Charges are consumed whenever you deal direct damage to the affected target, dealing an additional 158/173 magical damage(Chain Missile damage does not count as direct damage).

spells.name: Arcane Protection
spells.description:
Protect the targeted ally with arcane energy, applying a shield that absorbs up to 861/946 damage(before resistances) during the next 2s. Grants immunity to Forced Movement effects.
Blocking a Forced Movement effect will end this effect.
spells.description_html:
Protect the targeted ally with arcane energy, applying a shield that absorbs up to 861/946 damage(before resistances) during the next 2s.
Grants immunity to Forced Movement effects.

Blocking a Forced Movement effect will end this effect.

spells.name: Magic Shock
spells.description: Release a magic shock, silencing all enemies in a 3m radius for 1.19/1.31s. Deals 387/426 magical damage to all enemies hit.
spells.description_html:
Release a magic shock, silencing all enemies in a 3m radius for 1.19/1.31s.
Deals 387/426 magical damage to all enemies hit.

spells.name: Enigma Blade
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 4s
1st: Enigma Blade:
Conjure a magic blade that hits all enemies in a cone in the targeted direction, dealing 474/520 magical damage.
Hitting at least one enemy enables the next combo ability.
2nd Flicker:
Teleport to the targeted position (cannot teleport through obstacles).
Grants immunity to damage for 0.2s.
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 4s

1st: Enigma Blade:
Conjure a magic blade that hits all enemies in a cone in the targeted direction, dealing 474/520 magical damage.
Hitting at least one enemy enables the next combo ability.

2nd Flicker:
Teleport to the targeted position (cannot teleport through obstacles).
Grants immunity to damage for 0.2s.

spells.name: Motivating Cleanse
spells.description: Purify up to 10 allies in a 4m radius, cleansing all Crowd Control effects and debuffs(except damage over time effects; can be used while stunned or silenced). Increases the cleansed allies' Move Speed by 40% for 3s.
spells.description_html:
Purify up to 10 allies in a 4m radius, cleansing all Crowd Control effects and debuffs(except damage over time effects; can be used while stunned or silenced).
Increases the cleansed allies' Move Speed by 40% for 3s.

spells.name: Frazzle
spells.description:
Fire arcane energy at the targeted enemy, dealing
296/325 magical damage. Decreases Defense by 23.077% for 4s .
spells.description_html:
Fire arcane energy at the targeted enemy, dealing

296/325 magical damage.
Decreases Defense by 23.077% for 4s .

spells.name: Empowering Beam
spells.description:
Empower the targeted ally while channeling for 4.75s. Increases all damage the targeted ally deals by 8% every .25s (stacks up to 10 times).
The damage increase lastas for 0.8s after the channel ends.
spells.description_html:
Empower the targeted ally while channeling for 4.75s.
Increases all damage the targeted ally deals by 8% every .25s (stacks up to 10 times).

The damage increase lastas for 0.8s after the channel ends.

spells.name: Mimic
spells.description:
Mimic the targeted player, granting access to a second-slot ability based on the weapon equipped by the target for 20s.
Casting Mimic on an Arcane Staff wielder will grant you access to Magic Shock (the cooldown is independent from the Magic Shock you can select as your first-slot ability). 
The ability goes on cooldown if you either cast the mimicked ability or do not cast it while you have access to it. If you cast the mimicked ability, Mimic uses the cooldown of the mimicked ability.
spells.description_html:
Mimic the targeted player, granting access to a second-slot ability based on the weapon equipped by the target for 20s.

Casting Mimic on an Arcane Staff wielder will grant you access to Magic Shock (the cooldown is independent from the Magic Shock you can select as your first-slot ability).

The ability goes on cooldown if you either cast the mimicked ability or do not cast it while you have access to it. If you cast the mimicked ability, Mimic uses the cooldown of the mimicked ability.

spells.name: Protective Beam
spells.description:
Conjures an arcane shield in a 5m radius around the targeted ally, while channeling for 9s. Absorbs up to 631 damage(before resistances). Reapplies the shield every 1s, costing 19 Energy.
The shield lastst up to 2s after the channel has ended.
spells.description_html:
Conjures an arcane shield in a 5m radius around the targeted ally, while channeling for 9s.
Absorbs up to 631 damage(before resistances).
Reapplies the shield every 1s, costing 19 Energy.

The shield lastst up to 2s after the channel has ended.

spells.name: Energetic
spells.description: Every normal attack, you restore 4 energy.
spells.description_html: Every normal attack, you restore 4 energy.

spells.name: Lingering Power
spells.description: After casting any spell, increase your Attack Speed by 120% and your Attack Range by 33% for the next 3 normal attacks within 3s.
spells.description_html: After casting any spell, increase your Attack Speed by 120% and your Attack Range by 33% for the next 3 normal attacks within 3s.

spells.name: Calmness
spells.description: After every 5 spells cast increase your damage resistances by 70/71 for 3s.
spells.description_html: After every 5 spells cast increase your damage resistances by 70/71 for 3s.

spells.name: Hush
spells.description: After every 5 spells cast your next normal attack silences the targeted enemy for 1.75s/1.92s.
spells.description_html: After every 5 spells cast your next normal attack silences the targeted enemy for 1.75s/1.92s.

spells.name: Chain Missile
spells.description:
Shoot a Chain Missile in the targeted direction, dealing 379/416 magical damage to the first enemy hit. Upon hitting an enemy, it will jump to the closest enemy within 7m of the last enemy hit, dealing 72/79 magical damage to all following enemies(can hit up to 3 targets; can't hit the same target multiple times). Applies one Arcane Charge to all enemies hit.
Arcane Charges are consumed whenever you deal direct damage to the affected target, dealing an additional 158/173 magical damage(Chain Missile damage does not count as direct damage).
spells.description_html:
Shoot a Chain Missile in the targeted direction, dealing 379/416 magical damage to the first enemy hit.
Upon hitting an enemy, it will jump to the closest enemy within 7m of the last enemy hit, dealing 72/79 magical damage to all following enemies(can hit up to 3 targets; can't hit the same target multiple times).
Applies one Arcane Charge to all enemies hit.

Arcane Charges are consumed whenever you deal direct damage to the affected target, dealing an additional 158/173 magical damage(Chain Missile damage does not count as direct damage).

spells.name: Time Freeze
spells.description:
Freeze time for all enemies within a 5m radius for 3s(vs. players)/4s(vs. mobs)(ignores Crowd Control Resistance). Targets frozen in time are stunned. Players frozen in time are also immune to damage and all abilities.
Targets cannot be frozen again for 5s.

Targets cannot be frozen again for 5s.
