Casting Mimic on an Arcane Staff wielder will grant you access to Magic Shock (the cooldown is independent from the Magic Shock you can select as your first-slot ability). 
The ability goes on cooldown if you either cast the mimicked ability or do not cast it while you have access to it. If you cast the mimicked ability, Mimic uses the cooldown of the mimicked ability.
spells.description_html:
Mimic the targeted player, granting access to a second-slot ability based on the weapon equipped by the target for 20s.

Casting Mimic on an Arcane Staff wielder will grant you access to Magic Shock (the cooldown is independent from the Magic Shock you can select as your first-slot ability).

The ability goes on cooldown if you either cast the mimicked ability or do not cast it while you have access to it. If you cast the mimicked ability, Mimic uses the cooldown of the mimicked ability.

spells.name: Time Corridor
spells.description:
Create a 25m long corridor of altered time in the targeted direction, lasting for 8s. Increases Move Speed by 60% and Attack Speed by 45% for all allies in the corridor.
Slows all enemies in the corridor by 30%.
spells.description_html:
Create a 25m long corridor of altered time in the targeted direction, lasting for 8s. Increases Move Speed by 60% and Attack Speed by 45% for all allies in the corridor.

Slows all enemies in the corridor by 30%.

spells.name: Energetic
spells.description: Every normal attack, you restore 4 energy.
spells.description_html: Every normal attack, you restore 4 energy.

spells.name: Lingering Power
spells.description: After casting any spell, increase your Attack Speed by 120% and your Attack Range by 33% for the next 3 normal attacks within 3s.
spells.description_html: After casting any spell, increase your Attack Speed by 120% and your Attack Range by 33% for the next 3 normal attacks within 3s.

spells.name: Calmness
spells.description: After every 5 spells cast increase your damage resistances by 70/71 for 3s.
spells.description_html: After every 5 spells cast increase your damage resistances by 70/71 for 3s.

spells.name: Hush
spells.description: After every 5 spells cast your next normal attack silences the targeted enemy for 1.75s/1.92s.
spells.description_html: After every 5 spells cast your next normal attack silences the targeted enemy for 1.75s/1.92s.

spells.name: Chain Missile
spells.description:
Shoot a Chain Missile in the targeted direction, dealing 379/416 magical damage to the first enemy hit. Upon hitting an enemy, it will jump to the closest enemy within 7m of the last enemy hit, dealing 72/79 magical damage to all following enemies(can hit up to 3 targets; can't hit the same target multiple times). Applies one Arcane Charge to all enemies hit.
Arcane Charges are consumed whenever you deal direct damage to the affected target, dealing an additional 158/173 magical damage(Chain Missile damage does not count as direct damage).
spells.description_html:
Shoot a Chain Missile in the targeted direction, dealing 379/416 magical damage to the first enemy hit.
Upon hitting an enemy, it will jump to the closest enemy within 7m of the last enemy hit, dealing 72/79 magical damage to all following enemies(can hit up to 3 targets; can't hit the same target multiple times).
Applies one Arcane Charge to all enemies hit.

Arcane Charges are consumed whenever you deal direct damage to the affected target, dealing an additional 158/173 magical damage(Chain Missile damage does not count as direct damage).

spells.name: Arcane Protection
spells.description:
Protect the targeted ally with arcane energy, applying a shield that absorbs up to 861/946 damage(before resistances) during the next 2s. Grants immunity to Forced Movement effects.
Blocking a Forced Movement effect will end this effect.
spells.description_html:
Protect the targeted ally with arcane energy, applying a shield that absorbs up to 861/946 damage(before resistances) during the next 2s.
Grants immunity to Forced Movement effects.

Blocking a Forced Movement effect will end this effect.

spells.name: Magic Shock
spells.description: Release a magic shock, silencing all enemies in a 3m radius for 1.19/1.31s. Deals 387/426 magical damage to all enemies hit.
spells.description_html:
Release a magic shock, silencing all enemies in a 3m radius for 1.19/1.31s.
Deals 387/426 magical damage to all enemies hit.

spells.name: Enigma Blade
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 4s
1st: Enigma Blade:
Conjure a magic blade that hits all enemies in a cone in the targeted direction, dealing 474/520 magical damage.
Hitting at least one enemy enables the next combo ability.
2nd Flicker:
Teleport to the targeted position (cannot teleport through obstacles).
Grants immunity to damage for 0.2s.

Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 4s

Grants immunity to damage for 0.2s.

spells.name: Motivating Cleanse
spells.description: Purify up to 10 allies in a 4m radius, cleansing all Crowd Control effects and debuffs(except damage over time effects; can be used while stunned or silenced). Increases the cleansed allies' Move Speed by 40% for 3s.
spells.description_html:
Purify up to 10 allies in a 4m radius, cleansing all Crowd Control effects and debuffs(except damage over time effects; can be used while stunned or silenced).
Increases the cleansed allies' Move Speed by 40% for 3s.

spells.description:
Empower the targeted ally while channeling for 4.75s. Increases all damage the targeted ally deals by 8% every .25s (stacks up to 10 times).
The damage increase lastas for 0.8s after the channel ends.

spells.name: The Void
spells.description: Creates an area which removes all positive effects from enemies and removes all negative effects from allies, while also Increasing the resistances of allies by 85. While channeling, the area grows from 2m up to 8m radius, and collapses once the channeling ends. The channel can't be interrupted and lasts for 5s.

spells.name: Dark Sphere
spells.description:
Call down a dark sphere, impacting after 0.4s. Deals 315 magical damage to all enemies in a 5m radius. Applies a Dark Aura on up to 3 enemies hit.
Each Dark Aura has a 5m radius around the affected enemy lasting for 5s. Decreases healing received by 25% and all damage dealt by 25%(vs players)/ by 12%(vs mobs) within the aura. Slows by 15%(all effects stack up to 3 times).

Deals 315 magical damage to all enemies in a 5m radius.

spells.name: Frozen Crystal
spells.description:
Create a freezing field in a 6m radius around the target, lasting 3s. Slows all enemies in it by 30% (ignores Crowd Control Resistance).
Targeting an ally will freeze the target in a crystal immediately for 2s. Targeting an enemy will freeze the target in a crystal after 1.1s for 2s, if it hasn't left the field. Frozen targets are stunned, immune to damage, and can't be healed. 
After the freeze ends, the crystal explodes, dealing 640 magical damage to all enemies within a 2m radius.
spells.description_html:
Create a freezing field in a 6m radius around the target, lasting 3s. Slows all enemies in it by 30% (ignores Crowd Control Resistance).

Targeting an ally will freeze the target in a crystal immediately for 2s. Targeting an enemy will freeze the target in a crystal after 1.1s for 2s, if it hasn't left the field. Frozen targets are stunned, immune to damage, and can't be healed.

After the freeze ends, the crystal explodes, dealing 640 magical damage to all enemies within a 2m radius.

spells.name: Dark Matter
spells.description:
Cast an orb of Dark Matter at the targeted enemy.
It then jumps to the closest enemy within 9m of the last enemy hit, dealing 210/230 magical damage (vs. players)/105/116 magical damage(vs. mobs) with each hit (can hit up to 10 targets; can hit the same target multiple times but not twice in a row).

spells.name: Inner Shadow
spells.description:
Reveal the Inner Shadow of the targeted player, dealing damage to all enemies within a 5m radius around the position where the target was standing.
For targets wearing cloth armor: Lasts for 5.2s. Deals 189 magical damage(vs. players)/92 magical damage(vs. mobs) every 0.5s.
For targets wearing leather armor: Lasts for 3.2s. Deals 69 magical damage every 0.5s. Steals 100% of the Health the enemy has lost.
For targets wearing plate armor: Slows all enemies within the area by 40% for 2.2s. After the slow ends, the shadow hits all enemies within the area, dealing
413 physical damage
Reduces the damage resistance of all enemies hit by 
87
for 5s
spells.description_html:
Reveal the Inner Shadow of the targeted player, dealing damage to all enemies within a 5m radius around the position where the target was standing.

For targets wearing cloth armor: Lasts for 5.2s. Deals 189 magical damage(vs. players)/92 magical damage(vs. mobs) every 0.5s.

For targets wearing leather armor: Lasts for 3.2s. Deals 69 magical damage every 0.5s. Steals 100% of the Health the enemy has lost.

For targets wearing plate armor: Slows all enemies within the area by 40% for 2.2s. After the slow ends, the shadow hits all enemies within the area, dealing 413 physical damage Reduces the damage resistance of all enemies hit by 87 for 5s

spells.name: Unstable Projectile
spells.description:
Shoot a projectile of unstable energy at target enemy, dealing 227 magical damage to the target and shattering in a cone behind them. Deals 126 magical damage to all enemies hit by the cone. Applies one Shift Charge on you.
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).
spells.description_html:
Shoot a projectile of unstable energy at target enemy, dealing 227 magical damage to the target and shattering in a cone behind them.
Deals 126 magical damage to all enemies hit by the cone.
Applies one Shift Charge on you.

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Reality Fissure
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 5s.
1st Reality Crack 
Cause a brief crack in reality into the targeted direction, dealing 252 magical damage to all enemies hit. Hitting at least one enemy will apply one Shift Charge on you and continue the combo
2nd Reality Fissue 
Create a fissure in reality into the targeted direction, dealing 432 magical damage to all enemies hit. Hitting at least one enemy will apply two Shift Charges on you and continue the combo.
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).
spells.description_html:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 5s.

1st Reality Crack
Cause a brief crack in reality into the targeted direction, dealing 252 magical damage to all enemies hit.
Hitting at least one enemy will apply one Shift Charge on you and continue the combo

2nd Reality Fissue
Create a fissure in reality into the targeted direction, dealing 432 magical damage to all enemies hit.
Hitting at least one enemy will apply two Shift Charges on you and continue the combo.

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Adapting Matter
spells.description:
Unleash unstable energy at the target position, dealing 221 magical damage to enemies. Applies a shield to yourself and up to 3 allies that absorbs 441 magical damage for 1.5s.
Hitting at least one enemy will apply one Shift Charge. Hitting at least one ally will apply one Shift Charge on you.
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

Hitting at least one ally will apply one Shift Charge on you.

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Pulse Shock
spells.description:
Cast a shockwave in front of you, dealing 426 magical damage. Decreases damage resistances by 6 magical damage for 6s (stacks up to 3 times). Each enemy hit applies one Shift Charge on you (up to 2 times).
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Sinister Swipes
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2s.
1st and 2nd Swipe 
Charge through the targeted enemy, dealing 284 physical damage. Consuming 2 Shift Charges lest you continue the combo
3rd Sinister Swipe 
Charge through the targeted enemy dealing 284 physical damage. Additionally deal 25% of the target's missing health as true damage(vs players)/40% of the target's missing health as physical damage (vs mobs). Sets your cooldown of your transformation to 15s.

Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 2s.

1st and 2nd Swipe
Charge through the targeted enemy, dealing 284 physical damage.
Consuming 2 Shift Charges lest you continue the combo

3rd Sinister Swipe
Charge through the targeted enemy dealing 284 physical damage. Additionally deal 25% of the target's missing health as true damage(vs players)/40% of the target's missing health as physical damage (vs mobs).
Sets your cooldown of your transformation to 15s.

spells.name: Pounce
spells.description:
Leap towards target position, dealing 520 physical damage in a 4m radius upon impact.
Hitting an enemy player, will reduce the cooldown of this ability by 50%.
spells.description_html:

spells.name: Shadow Panther Transformation
spells.description:
Transform into a Shadow Panther for up to 12s. This changes your abilities and stats.
Offensive: high
Defensive: low
Energy Regeneration: very high
On The Prowl 
If no enemies are within in a 9m radius around you for 1s, you will turn invisible to players, but reduce your Movement Speed by 30%. While invisible, enemies within a 25m radius will be alerted.

spells.name: Infected Scrapes
spells.description: Every Auto-Attack, inflict a bleed on the targeted enemy dealing 22 physical damage over 3.75s. Starts 0.75 after you stop attacking the targeted enemy. Decreases healing received by 4% (stacks up to 5 times).

spells.name: Distortion
spells.description:
Conjure a cloud of distorted reality with a 4m radius at the targeted location, lasting 3s. Deals 252 magical damage every 0.75s. Slows all enemies within it by 20%.
Each enemy hit applies one Shift Charge on you (up to 2 times). 
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Positional Drift
spells.description:
Shoot out tendrils in the targeted direction, pulling up to 5 enemies towards you, rooting them for 2.07s. Deals 268 magical damage to all enemies hit.
Each enemy hit applies one Shift Charge on you (up to 2 times). 
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).
spells.description_html:

spells.name: Tether Shift
spells.description:
Attach a tether to an unmounted group member or enemy, lasting 7s. Applies one shift Charge on you.
Group members have their damage resistances increased by 59 as long as they are connected.
Recast the ability to activate the tether. If it is attached to an enemy, you will dash towards them. If it is attached to a group member, you will pull them towards you. Apply a shield on the pulled group member that absorbs 315 damage for 1.5s.
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).
spells.description_html:
Attach a tether to an unmounted group member or enemy, lasting 7s.
Applies one shift Charge on you.

Group members have their damage resistances increased by 59 as long as they are connected.

If it is attached to an enemy, you will dash towards them.
If it is attached to a group member, you will pull them towards you.
Apply a shield on the pulled group member that absorbs 315 damage for 1.5s.

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Polymorph
spells.description:
Shoot an energy orb in the target direction, transforming the first unmounted, not transformed player hit into a helpless animal for 2.5s. Hitting a mob or transformed player will decrease their max and current Health by 15% for 5s instead. The affected player becomes immune to Polymorph's non damage effects for 5s.
The Orb explodes on impact, dealing 347 magical damage in a 4m radius
Hitting at least one enemy will apply one Shift Charge on you. 
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Seedling's Bloom
spells.description:
Create a Seedling's Bloom with a 3m radius at the targeted position, lasting 8s. Deals 271 magical damage on impact. Allies within in the Bloom heal 15 Health every 1s.
If at least one Shift Charge is active on you, the Bloom will consume it, growing up to a 6m radius over 2s. Allies within the empowered Refuge heal 30 Health every 1s. Increases the Healing Received by 3m.

spells.name: Barbed Roots
spells.description:
Gather nature's energy, becoming immune to damage, while channeling for up to 3s (can't be interrupted; can be used while stunned or silenced). Slows all enemies within a 11m radius by 50%. Deals 173 magical damage every 0.7s.
At the start of the channel, cleanse all Crowd Control effects and debuffs (except damage over time effects) of up to 20 allies in the radius. While in the radius, allies gain a shield that absorbs up to 662 damage during the next 3s. Grants immunity to Forced Movement effects.

2nd Roar:
Unleash a mighty roar, dealing 410 physical damage(vs players)/631 physical damage(vs mobs) in a cone in front of you.
Enemies hit will flee from you for 1.2s.
Makes you the highest-priority target for all mobs hit.

spells.name: Swipes
spells.description: Every Auto-Attack cleaves in a cone in front of you, dealing 95 physical damage to all enemies hit (except the targeted enemy). While at least one Shift Charge is active on you, your attacks will slow all enemies hit by 20% for 1.54s.
spells.description_html: Every Auto-Attack cleaves in a cone in front of you, dealing 95 physical damage to all enemies hit (except the targeted enemy). While at least one Shift Charge is active on you, your attacks will slow all enemies hit by 20% for 1.54s.

spells.name: Unstable Projectile
spells.description:
Shoot a projectile of unstable energy at target enemy, dealing 227 magical damage to the target and shattering in a cone behind them. Deals 126 magical damage to all enemies hit by the cone. Applies one Shift Charge on you.
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).
spells.description_html:
Shoot a projectile of unstable energy at target enemy, dealing 227 magical damage to the target and shattering in a cone behind them.
Deals 126 magical damage to all enemies hit by the cone.
Applies one Shift Charge on you.

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Reality Fissure
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 5s.
1st Reality Crack 
Cause a brief crack in reality into the targeted direction, dealing 252 magical damage to all enemies hit. Hitting at least one enemy will apply one Shift Charge on you and continue the combo
2nd Reality Fissue 
Create a fissure in reality into the targeted direction, dealing 432 magical damage to all enemies hit. Hitting at least one enemy will apply two Shift Charges on you and continue the combo.
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 5s.

2nd Reality Fissue

Hitting at least one enemy will apply two Shift Charges on you and continue the combo.

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Adapting Matter
spells.description:
Unleash unstable energy at the target position, dealing 221 magical damage to enemies. Applies a shield to yourself and up to 3 allies that absorbs 441 magical damage for 1.5s.
Hitting at least one enemy will apply one Shift Charge. Hitting at least one ally will apply one Shift Charge on you.
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

Unleash unstable energy at the target position, dealing 221 magical damage to enemies.

Hitting at least one enemy will apply one Shift Charge.
Hitting at least one ally will apply one Shift Charge on you.

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Pulse Shock
spells.description:
Cast a shockwave in front of you, dealing 426 magical damage. Decreases damage resistances by 6 magical damage for 6s (stacks up to 3 times). Each enemy hit applies one Shift Charge on you (up to 2 times).
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).
spells.description_html:
Cast a shockwave in front of you, dealing 426 magical damage.
Decreases damage resistances by 6 magical damage for 6s (stacks up to 3 times).
Each enemy hit applies one Shift Charge on you (up to 2 times).

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Distortion
spells.description:
Conjure a cloud of distorted reality with a 4m radius at the targeted location, lasting 3s. Deals 252 magical damage every 0.75s. Slows all enemies within it by 20%.
Each enemy hit applies one Shift Charge on you (up to 2 times). 
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).
spells.description_html:
Conjure a cloud of distorted reality with a 4m radius at the targeted location, lasting 3s.
Deals 252 magical damage every 0.75s.
Slows all enemies within it by 20%.

Each enemy hit applies one Shift Charge on you (up to 2 times).

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Positional Drift
spells.description:
Shoot out tendrils in the targeted direction, pulling up to 5 enemies towards you, rooting them for 2.07s. Deals 268 magical damage to all enemies hit.
Each enemy hit applies one Shift Charge on you (up to 2 times). 
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).
spells.description_html:
Shoot out tendrils in the targeted direction, pulling up to 5 enemies towards you, rooting them for 2.07s.
Deals 268 magical damage to all enemies hit.

Each enemy hit applies one Shift Charge on you (up to 2 times).

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Tether Shift
spells.description:
Attach a tether to an unmounted group member or enemy, lasting 7s. Applies one shift Charge on you.
Group members have their damage resistances increased by 59 as long as they are connected.
Recast the ability to activate the tether. If it is attached to an enemy, you will dash towards them. If it is attached to a group member, you will pull them towards you. Apply a shield on the pulled group member that absorbs 315 damage for 1.5s.
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).
spells.description_html:
Attach a tether to an unmounted group member or enemy, lasting 7s.
Applies one shift Charge on you.

Group members have their damage resistances increased by 59 as long as they are connected.

Recast the ability to activate the tether.
If it is attached to an enemy, you will dash towards them.
If it is attached to a group member, you will pull them towards you.
Apply a shield on the pulled group member that absorbs 315 damage for 1.5s.

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Polymorph
spells.description:
Shoot an energy orb in the target direction, transforming the first unmounted, not transformed player hit into a helpless animal for 2.5s. Hitting a mob or transformed player will decrease their max and current Health by 15% for 5s instead. The affected player becomes immune to Polymorph's non damage effects for 5s.
The Orb explodes on impact, dealing 347 magical damage in a 4m radius
Hitting at least one enemy will apply one Shift Charge on you. 
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).
spells.description_html:

The Orb explodes on impact, dealing 347 magical damage in a 4m radius

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Altered Beast
spells.description: When transforming, you increase your Max and Current Health by 2% for 5s for each Shift Charge (stacks up to 5 times).
spells.description_html: When transforming, you increase your Max and Current Health by 2% for 5s for each Shift Charge (stacks up to 5 times).

spells.name: Intimidating Presence
spells.description: Anyitme one of you Q-Abilities hits an enemy, decrease their damage by 3% for 7s (stacks up to 3 times). Increase your Threat Generation against mobs by 100%
spells.description_html:
Anyitme one of you Q-Abilities hits an enemy, decrease their damage by 3% for 7s (stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Rule Bender
spells.description: After casting a W-Ability, increase your Auto-Attack Speed and Cast Speed by 30% for 5s.
spells.description_html: After casting a W-Ability, increase your Auto-Attack Speed and Cast Speed by 30% for 5s.

spells.name: Infected Scrapes
spells.description: Every Auto-Attack, inflict a bleed on the targeted enemy dealing 22 physical damage over 3.75s. Starts 0.75 after you stop attacking the targeted enemy. Decreases healing received by 4% (stacks up to 5 times).

spells.name: Werewolf Transformation
spells.description:
Transform into a Werewolf for up to 20s. This changes your abilities and stats.
Offensive: medium
Defensive: medium
Energy Regeneration: very high
Bloody Roar 
Whenever you deal damage, steal 7% of the Health the enemy has lost.

spells.name: Tear Open
spells.description:
Tear apart everything in a cone in front of you, dealing 378 physical damage to all enemies hit.
If at least one Shift Charge is active on you, the ability will consume it, creating a Blood Pool behind the first enemy hit.
Entering the Blood Pool will consume it, healing you for 120 Health. Increase your Move Speed by 40% for 3s.

spells.name: Hellfire Imp Transformation
spells.description:
Transform into a Hellfire Imp for up to 30s. This changes your abilities and stats.
Offensive: very high
Defensive: very low
Energy Regeneration: very high
Return from Hell 
When your Health would drop to 0, you become immune to death and heal yourself over 3.5s based on the amount of Shift Charges on you. While healing you are immune to damage and stunned. 

Shift Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5
Heal: 5% | 10% | 15% | 20% | 25% | 30%
Consumes all Shift Charges and the Shape's cooldown is increased to 1m 00s.

spells.name: Tectonic Shift
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 4s.
1st Tectonic Shift 
Shift the ground, creating a stone wall in a cone in front of you which knocks back enemies by 2m. Pulls all enemies between you and the wall towards you. Deals 189 physical damage(vs players)/441 physical damage(vs mobs) to all enemies pulled. Makes you the highest-priority target for all mobs hit.
2nd Tectonic Slam 
Slam the ground, dealing 394 physical damage in a 6m radius. Throws all enemies hit into the air for 3.07s. Creates a Rune, lasting 5s which decreases Max and current Health of all enemies within by 15%.

spells.name: Rejuvenating Breeze
spells.description:
Release a Rejuvenating Breeze from the targeted ally, increasing the target's damage resistance by 84 for 2s . The breeze hits up to 10 allies within a 15m radius around the target. All allies hit receive the same number of Rejuvenation Charges as the targeted ally has.
Each Rejuvenation Charge restores 127 Health over 8s ( stacks up to 3 times).

Each Rejuvenation Charge restores 127 Health over 8s ( stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Dual Nature
spells.description:
Gather ambient magic, affecting up to 10 targets in a 7m radius around you for 8s. While the ability is active, recasting invokes the opposing ability.

Fortify:
Grants a 387 damage shield for 1.5s.
Restores 55 Health to allies every 0.85s.
Increases your Healing Cast by 15%.

Ensnare:
Roots enemies for 2.74s (enemies cannot be Rooted by you again).
Increases allies' Damage by 15%.

spells.name: Sunder Armor
spells.description: Attack the targeted enemy, dealing 244 physical damage . Applies one Sunder Armor Charge. Each Sunder Armor Charge decreases damage resistances by 12 (vs players) / 18 (vs mobs) for 8s ( stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Deadly Swipe
spells.description:
Leap towards the targeted position, dealing 258/284 physical damage to all enemies in a 3m radius. Applies one Assassin Spirit on you for every enemy hit.
Hitting at least one enemy will restore 21/23 Energy. 
Each Assassin Spirit Charge increases all your damage by 6% for 8s(stacks up to 3 times).

spells.name: Assassin Spirit
spells.description: Invoke your Assassin Spirit, applying an Assassin Spirit Charge on you every 3s . Decreases your Defense by 3.846% . The ability can last up to 15s but can be deactivated earlier . Each Assassin Spirit Charge increases all your damage by 6% for 8s

spells.name: Throwing Blades
spells.description: Throw three Throwing Blades in a cone in the targeted direction, piercing through all enemies and dealing 128 magical damage . Increases your Move Speed by 25% , and all damage you deal by 15% , for each unique enemy hit ( stacks up to 3 times) for 5s .

spells.name: Merciless Finish

Swing your daggers in a cone in front of you while leaping backwards 8m . Deals physical damage based on the number of Assassin Spirit Charges on you or Sunder Armor Charges on the target.
Charges: 0 | 1 | 2 | 3 
Damage: 289 | 461 | 691 | 976 
Consumes all applied Assassin Spirit Charges or Sunder Armor Charges

Land a Flowing Blow on the targeted enemy, dealing 248 physical damage in a cone in front of you.
3rd: Concussive Blow
Land an overhead Concussive Blow on the target, dealing 397 physical damage and stuns for 2.31s.

Casting Mimic on an Arcane Staff wielder will grant you access to Magic Shock (the cooldown is independent from the Magic Shock you can select as your first-slot ability). 
The ability goes on cooldown if you either cast the mimicked ability or do not cast it while you have access to it. If you cast the mimicked ability, Mimic uses the cooldown of the mimicked ability.

spells.description:
Enchant the targeted ally's normal attacks for the next 10s.

Damage: 52/57 | 65/71 | 155/170 | 258/284 | 387/426

spells.name: Dark Matter
spells.description:
Cast an orb of Dark Matter at the targeted enemy.
It then jumps to the closest enemy within 9m of the last enemy hit, dealing 210/230 magical damage (vs. players)/105/116 magical damage(vs. mobs) with each hit (can hit up to 10 targets; can hit the same target multiple times but not twice in a row).

spells.name: Inner Shadow
spells.description:
Reveal the Inner Shadow of the targeted player, dealing damage to all enemies within a 5m radius around the position where the target was standing.
For targets wearing cloth armor: Lasts for 5.2s. Deals 189 magical damage(vs. players)/92 magical damage(vs. mobs) every 0.5s.
For targets wearing leather armor: Lasts for 3.2s. Deals 69 magical damage every 0.5s. Steals 100% of the Health the enemy has lost.
For targets wearing plate armor: Slows all enemies within the area by 40% for 2.2s. After the slow ends, the shadow hits all enemies within the area, dealing
413 physical damage
Reduces the damage resistance of all enemies hit by 
87
for 5s

spells.name: Unstable Projectile
spells.description:
Shoot a projectile of unstable energy at target enemy, dealing 227 magical damage to the target and shattering in a cone behind them. Deals 126 magical damage to all enemies hit by the cone. Applies one Shift Charge on you.
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

Applies one Shift Charge on you.

Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Reality Fissure
spells.description:
Combine up to two abilities. The combo resets after 5s.
1st Reality Crack 
Cause a brief crack in reality into the targeted direction, dealing 252 magical damage to all enemies hit. Hitting at least one enemy will apply one Shift Charge on you and continue the combo
2nd Reality Fissue 
Create a fissure in reality into the targeted direction, dealing 432 magical damage to all enemies hit. Hitting at least one enemy will apply two Shift Charges on you and continue the combo.
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Adapting Matter
spells.description:
Unleash unstable energy at the target position, dealing 221 magical damage to enemies. Applies a shield to yourself and up to 3 allies that absorbs 441 magical damage for 1.5s.
Hitting at least one enemy will apply one Shift Charge. Hitting at least one ally will apply one Shift Charge on you.
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Tether Shift
spells.description:
Attach a tether to an unmounted group member or enemy, lasting 7s. Applies one shift Charge on you.
Group members have their damage resistances increased by 59 as long as they are connected.
Recast the ability to activate the tether. If it is attached to an enemy, you will dash towards them. If it is attached to a group member, you will pull them towards you. Apply a shield on the pulled group member that absorbs 315 damage for 1.5s.
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Polymorph
spells.description:
Shoot an energy orb in the target direction, transforming the first unmounted, not transformed player hit into a helpless animal for 2.5s. Hitting a mob or transformed player will decrease their max and current Health by 15% for 5s instead. The affected player becomes immune to Polymorph's non damage effects for 5s.
The Orb explodes on impact, dealing 347 magical damage in a 4m radius
Hitting at least one enemy will apply one Shift Charge on you. 
Shift Charges are consumed to empower the abilities of your shape (stacks are removed when mounting up).

spells.name: Serpent's Gaze
spells.description: Enchant your gaze to Petrify unmounted enemies while channeling for up to 3s (can't be interrupted). Deals 8% true damage (vs players) / 388 magical damage (vs mobs) over 2.8s. Petrified enemies are stunned (ignores Crowd Control Resistance, cannot be cleansed) and Immune to Forced Movement effects. Petrified players take 70% less Damage vs. All and have their Healing Received decreased by 70%. Targets cannot be Petrified again for 10s.
